name: Cloud Adoption Framework (7-phase gated)
description: VOSJ flagship reference framework: a Cloud Adoption Framework spine compiled into seven gated phases P1..P7 mapped onto the V-O-S-J stations (whitepaper section 6). The Shift->Jump cutover gate is the engine-injected verified-before-Jump gate.

phases.name: Envision
phases.goal: Strategy & business case: motivation, TCO/value case, readiness assessment across business/people/governance/platform/security/operations; target platform(s) chosen.

phases.name: Examine
phases.goal: Discover, baseline, decide: application-centric inventory + dependency DAG; performance/error baselines; a 7-R disposition for every in-scope workload; wave plan v0; risk register v0.

gate.name: Kickoff complete
criteria: every in-scope workload carries a disposition

phases.name: Engineer the Plan
phases.goal: Transition architecture (TOGAF); data-migration method selection; cited cutover runbook; independent rollback runbook (separate author/context); static tabletops; change requests through four-eyes validation.

phases.name: Establish Readiness
phases.goal: Landing zone & freeze: built/validated landing zone (network, identity, security baseline); calendar lock; baseline-drift check; infra/app freeze; vendor engagements verified.

gate.name: Execution freeze (drift auto; freeze InfoSec+DBA; vendor director)

phases.name: Shift / Execute
phases.goal: Verified incremental cutover: full-panel go/no-go; conductor steps the runbook calling executors via the bridge; Strangler-Fig parallel run / proxy switch; continuous contingency monitoring; per-step evidence hashed.

phases.name: Verify & Optimize
phases.goal: Reconcile & tune: reconciliation (row counts, checksums, sequence/identity values, BLOB counts, constraint re-validation, plan parity); post-migration metrics vs baseline; right-sizing.

gate.name: Reconciliation pass (DBA, revocable within 30 min on drift)
criteria: all pre-switch reconciliation categories within thresholds

phases.name: Jump to BAU & Learn
phases.goal: Hand over & improve: per-app BAU sign-off; monitoring/governance to steady state; decommission source after confirmed BAU + retention; post-mortem; lessons fed back into the template and the agent learning loop.
